name: Jane Kleeb, Our Revolution
subject: This is bigger than KXL or DAPL
body:
We have the technology, the workforce, and the need to transition our energy grid
#
Friends,
Donald Trump is turning his back on the Paris Climate Agreement that the United States made with nearly 200 other nations last fall. This decision is bad for our economy, our jobs, and our planet. Combatting climate change should be straightforward. The majority of Americans and nearly all scientists agree we need to act now. If our democracy worked the way it's supposed to our lawmakers would follow the will of the people.
We have the technology, the workforce, and the need to transition our energy grid off of fossil fuels to 100% sustainability as soon as possible. Our allies in Congress are working to that end--Jeff Merkley, Bernie Sanders, and Ed Markey have introduced the "100 by '50" Act in the Senate to bring us to 100% renewable energy by 2050.
[**We need to keep fossil fuels in the ground and revolutionize our energy system with clean, renewable energy. Will you sign our petition in support of S. 987, the "100 by '50" Act?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d48/43f17890/d7d1ecbc/62038c04/2980916330/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/100by50v2?source=em170531-full")
Let's face it: if America isn't going to lead the way on the global stage, another country will. With ever-widening income and wealth inequality and a deteriorating environment, we cannot afford to turn our backs on cutting edge technology that will save homes, save lives, and save our planet.
We're working against the clock. Your help fighting this reckless, vindictive decision by Donald Trump is needed now more than ever. [**Stand with us and support 100% clean energy by 2050. Together we can build the clean energy future that we need for this generation and those to come.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d48/43f17890/d7d1ecbc/62038c04/2980916330/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/100by50v2?source=em170531-full")
I will be there with you fighting this greed every day.
In solidarity,
Jane Kleeb
Our Revolution Board Member
Rural and Environmental Advocate
**[SIGN THE PETITION»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d48/43f17890/d7d1ecbc/62038c04/2980916330/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/100by50v2?source=em170531-full")**

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: why you matter in this fight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Americans aren't sitting idly by while Trump and the GOP try to roll back the progress we've made in this country.

And I couldn't be more proud.

Together, we are defending our American values with every protest, call to your representative, letter to the editor and petition signed. I want to thank you for standing up for what you believe in and I hope I can count on you for the challenge ahead.

In a few hours, Democrats face an important deadline. This is our first finance deadline since Trump released his extreme budget and it's an opportunity to send a clear, unified message that we are ready for the fight ahead. As Chair of the DSCC, my 2018 Victory Fund is dedicated to helping Senate Democrats win big next year. Here's a link from my team: [**http://action.vanhollen.org/2018VictoryFund**](http://action.vanhollen. Chris

name: Jay Inslee
subject: He's threatening decades of American leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
The Trump administration is threatening to end US participation in the Paris Agreement.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTExNjQwNjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDA4NTE4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, President Trump is once again on the wrong side of history, and our children will pay the price. President Trump is threatening to destroy the United States' commitment to the Paris Climate Agreement -- a landmark international agreement designed to protect our economic security against the growing threat of climate change. The president's refusal to embrace well-established scientific fact is cementing America's destiny as a nation that remains mired in the dirty, diminishing energy under our feet rather than a leader in harnessing the clean, renewable energy above our shoulders. These decisions will affect Washington state. They will affect _your_ children and grandchildren. They will affect _my_ children and grandchildren. They will change the entire planet. That's why, in Washington state, we are committed to leading the resistance against Trump's willful disregard of science and our most precious natural resources. And we will keep up the fight, regardless of who is in the White House. I know that I will keep fighting climate change and that I will keep fighting for a clean energy future for our state and our nation. In Washington we've adopted a cap on carbon, are investing in clean technologies, and promoting some of the most aggressive electric vehicle policies in the nation. And I know that, across the country, there are millions of individuals that are working to educate their friends and family on the dangers pollution and dirty energy pose to our planet. And I am proud to stand in defiance with them today. Trump's behavior is not just short-sighted, it is actually destructive to generations of American leadership. It threatens our ability to take bold action on building a clean energy economy in our state and our country. We can't sit back and just accept Trump's erratic behavior, not for a second. So I hope you'll keep fighting alongside me for the years to come. Please [**join me on Facebook**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTExNjQwNjAS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MDA4NTE4NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) and stay up to date on what we are doing to combat climate change. We're going to keep moving forward, no matter what our president does. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee
---

subject: Pluto downgraded, Twitter founded, House flipped >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79e3/24c69fd9/e176f769/18e44fea/3356019654/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact&source=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact")
---

Peter,

I want you to remember, for a moment, the year 2006.

Pluto was downgraded from a planet that year. Twitter was founded, and Facebook became widely available beyond college campuses. Beyonce's smash hit "Irreplaceable" topped the charts for 10 straight weeks.

And that's the last time Democrats took back the House from Republicans -- flipping **30 seats** , electing the first woman speaker, and becoming a critical firewall to the dangerous Bush agenda.

Next year, we need to take just **24 seats** to flip the House. It's our biggest opportunity in a decade, and our chances are even better than last time around.

**[Donate $3 to unseat Republicans, elect pro-choice Democratic women, and flip the House from red to blue next year.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79e3/24c69fd9/e176f769/18e44feb/3356019654/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170601_email_2006Flashback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+unseat+Republicans+elect+pro&utm_campaign=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact&source=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact")**

Since the 1950s, the House has only changed hands in midterm years, and it's only happened four times: 1954, 1994, 2006, and 2010. And many of us, myself included, remember what it felt like to see Democrats take control after our wins in 2006.

The midterms are our best bet for taking back control, since history shows flipping part of Congress is less likely to happen in presidential election years.

And it's the perfect time to harness the energy around the resistance sweeping the country right now. Americans want to elect people who share their values and care about their communities, and they're more than ready to boot anti-choice, anti-woman Republicans out of office.

We need to have a Democratic firewall in the House to stop President Trump's dangerous plans.

The tailwinds are in our favor. Now, we have to make sure we have the resources to get it done.

**Donate $3 to help flip the House next year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Flip-The-House-Again](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c79e3/24c69fd9/e176f769/18e44fe4/3356019654/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170601_email_2006Flashback?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFlipTheHouseAgai&utm_campaign=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact&source=WQEFE601N_digital_email_20170601_2006Flashback_inact")**

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

body:
I want to take a moment to say thanks. I'm grateful we can count on supporters like you.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/stand-with-dems?refcode=DPE-20170601-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team,

I want to take a moment to say thanks. With your help, we beat our $150,000 goal ahead of last night's FEC deadline.

While Trump and his fellow Republicans are cashing checks from billionaires and corporations to help elect a filibuster-proof GOP Senate majority, I'm grateful we can count on supporters like you to protect our Democratic senators now and during the fights ahead.

Because of your enthusiasm and commitment, while Senate Republicans draft their health care bill during this week's recess, we'll be able to keep taking the fight to their home states, with hard-hitting ads calling out their disastrous repeal plan.

And thanks to your outpouring of support, we'll be able to announce a huge number of individual contributions this month. That means that when our Senate Democrats are back in Washington, fighting their hardest to stop Obamacare repeal and the Trump-Ryan budget, our FEC report will show grassroots Democrats have their backs.

We know that standing up to Donald Trump requires constant vigilance, but just like Elizabeth Warren, we will persist. I'm thankful for your support and I know our Democratic senators are too.

Thanks for being a part of our team,

Mindy

**A quick note on your support, team:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: A bold thing to demand right now
body:
Right now, during the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time to do this. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f3/1c469400/255c97f/354a18e/1064538176/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2") Friend, This week I published an op-ed calling for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ to achieve today what the original VRA of 1965 set out to do: protect the equal right to vote for all. To meet that standard today, we need to go beyond the original VRA and insist on a 50-state pre-clearance requirement to undo and prevent further voter suppression. This is a bold thing to demand at a time when it seems like the deck is more stacked against us in Washington than ever. But right now, when we're in the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time we absolutely must demand this. Thousands of your fellow supporters have already signed on to show their support for the _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ , but I didn't see your name on the list. Will you join this effort today? [_**Join thousands of your fellow supporters now. Sign the petition to show your support for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ today.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f3/1c469400/255c97f/354a18f/1064538176/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Join+thousands+of+your+fellow+supporters&utm_campaign=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2") A modern _Voting Rights Act_ must include certain provisions, supplemented by state voting rights legislation if necessary, in order to truly restore legitimacy to our elections:
* Establish an independent Office of Voting Rights, solely to review and approve any proposed changes to voting rights regulations in the country.
* Establish a national standard for ID requirements that states cannot exceed.
* Mandate same-day voter registration.
* Mandate a minimum length of time for early voting.
* Ban any change to voting laws within 90 days of an election.
* Publicize any changes to voting regulations or procedures for a minimum length of time in multiple languages.
* End felony disenfranchisement, which keeps one in 14 Black citizens nationwide from voting but only restrict one in 56 non-Black citizens.
* End partisan gerrymandering so that the voters can choose their officials instead of officials choosing their voters.

Voting is the most important democratic right. Any infringement on the right to vote is a threat to the legitimacy of our democracy. This could be our generation's civil rights moment, our 1965, and we must rise to meet it. We need a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_. The onus is on us to demand one, and on Congress to pass it. [_**Sign the petition to show your support for a _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ today.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f3/1c469400/255c97f/354a18c/1064538176/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Sign+the+petition+to+show+your+support+f&utm_campaign=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2") Just as the landmark _Voting Rights Act of 1965_ addressed many of the worst voter suppression tactics of its day, like poll taxes and literacy tests, so must the new _21st Century Voting Rights Act_ address modern abuses. Thank you for standing up for our legitimacy, Russ Feingold | [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f3/1c469400/255c97f/354a18d/1064538176/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/21st-VRA-em_LP?source=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170601_r4w_VRA_msg2")
---

To meet that standard today, we need to go beyond the original VRA and insist on a 50-state pre-clearance requirement to undo and prevent further voter suppression. This is a bold thing to demand at a time when it seems like the deck is more stacked against us in Washington than ever. But right now, when we're in the greatest legitimacy crisis our government has ever seen, is precisely the time we absolutely must demand this. Thousands of your fellow supporters have already signed on to show their support for the 21st Century Voting Rights Act , but I didn't see your name on the list. Will you join this effort today? "" A modern Voting Rights Act must include certain provisions, supplemented by state voting rights legislation if necessary, in order to truly restore legitimacy to our elections: Establish an independent Office of Voting Rights, solely to review and approve any proposed changes to voting rights regulations in the country. Establish a national standard for ID requirements that states cannot exceed. Mandate same-day voter registration. Mandate a minimum length of time for early voting. Ban any change to voting laws within 90 days of an election. Publicize any changes to voting regulations or procedures for a minimum length of time in multiple languages. End felony disenfranchisement, which keeps one in 14 Black citizens nationwide from voting but only restrict one in 56 non-Black citizens. End partisan gerrymandering so that the voters can choose their officials instead of officials choosing their voters. Voting is the most important democratic right. Any infringement on the right to vote is a threat to the legitimacy of our democracy. This could be our generation's civil rights moment, our 1965, and we must rise to meet it. We need a 21st Century Voting Rights Act. The onus is on us to demand one, and on Congress to pass it. "" Just as the landmark Voting Rights Act of 1965 addressed many of the worst voter suppression tactics of its day, like poll taxes and literacy tests, so must the new 21st Century Voting Rights Act address modern abuses. Thank you for standing up for our legitimacy, Russ Feingold | ""

**Donald Trump just made a shocking announcement: he 's decided to back out of the Paris climate change agreement.**
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e697/2b07114c/2a7ce725/736fd04e/2478998520/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-paris-agreement?source=PT-20170601-Rapid_DS-ProsHV")**
Team,

Donald Trump just made a shocking announcement: he's decided to abandon our allies and back out of the Paris climate change agreement.

If Trump follows through on this decision, the consequences would be catastrophic. It may as well be the beginning of our nation's exit from the world stage -- seriously. **We would be one of three countries not participating in the multinational agreement.**

[**Tell Trump to keep our nation 's promise that we'll make progress in the fight against climate change. We have a responsibility to future generations to ensure that our water is pure, our air is clean and our planet is habitable, so add your name now.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e697/2b07114c/2a7ce725/736fd04e/2478998520/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-paris-agreement?source=PT-20170601-Rapid_DS-ProsHV")

The odds may be against us, but we're not giving up -- we're stepping up. This is just too important.

We'll never stop holding Trump accountable, and it is critical that he remain committed to the Paris agreement -- our country's reputation depends on it. And while Trump denies it now, climate change affects everyone.

[**That 's why we need you to add your name to our petition right now, team. Every signature is a powerful show of resistance against Trump's reckless, anti-science agenda.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e697/2b07114c/2a7ce725/736fd04e/2478998520/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-paris-agreement?source=PT-20170601-Rapid_DS-ProsHV")

Thanks for standing with us in this fight,

Team DSCC
